<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="api-reference">
<h1>API reference</h1>
<p>This page is generated reference material for selected internal Python modules.
The CLI and its documented JSON output are the user-facing interface. Python
module names and function signatures may change between releases unless a
separate API contract says otherwise.</p>
<p>The durable model names currently include <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationStoreV2</span></code>, translation
records and review candidates, context models, profile configuration, source
manifests, EPUB span metadata, and the v3 shard models in
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.store.models</span></code>. New profiles currently default to the v2 canonical
store, while the shard-based v3 backend under
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/translation-store/</span></code> remains an explicit opt-in
migration target. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationStoreV2</span></code> remains the compatibility
materialization model.</p>
<p>The reference is intentionally broad so generated documentation can expose
model fields and service helpers. It should not be read as a promise that every
imported symbol is a supported public API.</p>
<p id="module-booktx.config">Project configuration and path resolution for legacy and profile layouts.</p>
<p>booktx now supports two project shapes.</p>
<p>Legacy single-layout projects:</p>
<div class="highlight-default notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">/</span>
  <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">/</span>
  <span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">toml</span>
    <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">names</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">md</span>
    <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">translation</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">translation</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">tasks</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="n">ingest</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="n">reports</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="n">output</span><span class="o">/</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>Profile-layout projects:</p>
<div class="highlight-default notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">book</span><span class="o">/</span>
  <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">/</span>
  <span class="o">.</span><span class="n">booktx</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">toml</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">names</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="nb">map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
    <span class="n">chunks</span><span class="o">/</span>
  <span class="n">translations</span><span class="o">/</span>
    <span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">&gt;/</span>
      <span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">toml</span>
      <span class="n">identity</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
      <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
      <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">md</span>
      <span class="n">translation</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">store</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
      <span class="n">translation</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="n">ledger</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">json</span>
      <span class="n">tasks</span><span class="o">/</span>
      <span class="n">ingest</span><span class="o">/</span>
      <span class="n">translated</span><span class="o">/</span>
      <span class="n">reports</span><span class="o">/</span>
      <span class="n">output</span><span class="o">/</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>The shared <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/</span></code> tree is source-derived state only. Mutable translation
state lives under the explicitly resolved profile.</p>
<dl class="py exception">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.BooktxError">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">exception</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">BooktxError</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">code</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">message</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/errors/#BooktxError"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.BooktxError.__init__">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">__init__</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">code</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">message</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/errors/#BooktxError.__init__"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

</dd></dl>

<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/todos/</span></code>.  Raises <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.BooktxError" title="booktx.config.BooktxError"><code class="xref py py-exc docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">BooktxError</span></code></a>
if no profile is selected.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.translation_review_ingest_block_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">translation_review_ingest_block_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">review_task_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#translation_review_ingest_block_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.translation_source_index_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">translation_source_index_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#translation_source_index_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Profile-local generated source-only editor index path.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/source-index.json</span></code>. The file is a
rebuildable generated artifact, never canonical state.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.translation_target_index_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">translation_target_index_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#translation_target_index_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

rebuildable generated artifact, never canonical state.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.translation_source_target_index_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">translation_source_target_index_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#translation_source_target_index_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/source-target-index.json</span></code>. The file is
a rebuildable generated artifact, never canonical state.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.source_analysis_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">source_analysis_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#source_analysis_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Project-root canonical source-analysis JSON evidence path.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/source-analysis.json</span></code>. The file is rebuildable generated
evidence (authoritative JSON report), never canonical translation state.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.source_analysis_markdown_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">source_analysis_markdown_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#source_analysis_markdown_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Project-root generated source-analysis Markdown view path.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/source-analysis.md</span></code>. Generated from the canonical JSON
report; never authoritative.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.source_analysis_decisions_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">source_analysis_decisions_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#source_analysis_decisions_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Project-root durable source-analysis review/provenance sidecar.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.profile_source_analysis_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">profile_source_analysis_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#profile_source_analysis_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Profile-local generated source-analysis snapshot JSON path.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/source-analysis.json</span></code>. The snapshot
embeds the same report payload and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">analysis_sha256</span></code> as the canonical
project-root report inside a profile-scoped envelope. Rebuildable.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.profile_source_analysis_markdown_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">profile_source_analysis_markdown_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#profile_source_analysis_markdown_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Profile-local generated source-analysis snapshot Markdown path.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/source-analysis.md</span></code>. Generated from the
profile snapshot’s embedded report; never authoritative.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.find_source_file">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">find_source_file</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">persist_discovery</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#find_source_file"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Resolve the project source file.</p>
<p>By default this <strong>persists</strong> a newly discovered source file/format back into
the source config (a write side effect). Pass <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">persist_discovery=False</span></code>
for read-only lookups such as status overviews and hashing, so a getter no
longer mutates project state.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.project_storage_root">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">project_storage_root</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#project_storage_root"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the root used for persisted profile-local path strings.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.stored_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">stored_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#stored_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Persist a path relative to the resolved profile when available.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.config.resolve_stored_path">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.config.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">resolve_stored_path</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">stored_rel_path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/config/#resolve_stored_path"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Resolve a persisted path against legacy root-relative or profile-relative roots.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.models">Pydantic data models for the booktx translation contract.</p>
<p>This module defines the JSON shapes that cross the boundary between booktx and
the translating coding agent:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Source chunk  -&gt; <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chunks/NNNN.json</span></code>  (written by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">extract</span></code>)</p></li>
<li><p>Translated chunk -&gt; <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translated/NNNN.json</span></code> (written by the agent)</p></li>
</ul>
<p>Both must round-trip through JSON with stable field names and ordering.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.models.Placeholder">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.models.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">Placeholder</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">token</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">original</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">kind</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Literal" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Literal</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'name'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'tag'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'tag'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/models/#Placeholder"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>A non-translatable span that was replaced by a token during extraction.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">token</span></code> is the exact placeholder text that appears in the source field
(e.g. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__NAME_001__</span></code> or <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__TAG_001__</span></code>); <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">original</span></code> is the verbatim
text that must be restored verbatim during build.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.models.Placeholder.model_config">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">model_config</span></span><span class="property"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">{'extra':</span> <span class="pre">'forbid'}</span></span></dt>
<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

href="../_modules/booktx/models/#StatusTotals"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Aggregate translation coverage totals.</p>
<p>Used by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">status</span> <span class="pre">--json</span></code> and persisted in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationTodo.start_totals</span></code>.
Keep this model in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">models.py</span></code> so durable todo validation never depends on
a late Pydantic forward-reference rebuild.</p>

<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/models/#TranslationTodoChapter"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>One chapter selected for a bounded agent translation run.</p>
<p>Carries only coverage/state at the moment the todo was created; it never
embeds source text. Source text belongs in per-task <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">*.source.block.txt</span></code>.</p>

<dd><p>A durable run-control artifact for a bounded multi-chapter agent run.</p>
<p>Written by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">translate</span> <span class="pre">todo-next</span></code> under
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/todos/&lt;todo_id&gt;.{json,md}</span></code>. This is NOT a
translation submission: it tells the agent how many chapters to complete,
the per-task word budget, and the stop conditions.</p>

<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.models.ProfileIdentityConfig">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.models.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">ProfileIdentityConfig</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">actor</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'user:unknown'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">harness</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'booktx'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">model</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'human'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/models/#ProfileIdentityConfig"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Initial identity defaults captured when a profile is created.</p>
<p>This is <strong>not</strong> the live identity. After creation, the authoritative
identity lives in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/identity.json</span></code> and is updated
updated by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">identity</span> <span class="pre">set</span></code> / <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">identity</span> <span class="pre">clear</span></code>. Profile list and
show render the resolved <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">identity.json</span></code> value, not this field.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.models.ProfileIdentityConfig.model_config">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">model_config</span></span><span class="property"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">{'extra':</span> <span class="pre">'forbid'}</span></span></dt>
<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

<dd></dd></dl>

internal" href="../_modules/booktx/models/#TranslationReviewCandidate"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>One reviewed target stored separately from translation versions.</p>
<p>A review candidate records one quality-improved output of a numbered
review pass (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">R&lt;pass&gt;.&lt;run&gt;</span></code>). It is derived from a <em>base</em> candidate,
which is either a translation version (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">base_kind=&quot;translation&quot;</span></code>) or an
earlier review candidate (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">base_kind=&quot;review&quot;</span></code>). Review candidates
never overwrite translation versions.</p>

<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

<dd><p>One selected record in a review task.</p>
<p>Carries the base candidate being reviewed plus the review_ref this task
will create, so a single task can safely include records whose next run
number differs.</p>

<p>Carries the pass_number, selection mode, and base mode that will be used
when this pass is resumed via <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review</span> <span class="pre">todo-resume</span></code>.</p>

<dd><p>One chapter tracked by a durable review todo.</p>
<p>Captures review coverage at the moment the todo was created so callers
can detect progress and drift without re-reading the entire store.</p>

class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/models/#ReviewTodo"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>A durable run-control artifact for a bounded multi-pass review run.</p>
<p>Written by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">review</span> <span class="pre">todo-next</span></code> under
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/review-todos/&lt;review_todo_id&gt;.{json,md}</span></code>.
This tells the agent which review passes and chapters to process,
the per-pass selection and base modes, and the stop conditions.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.models.ReviewTodo.model_config">

<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

<dd></dd></dl>

<dd><p>Profile-level quality-review configuration.</p>
<p>Optional on <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ProfileConfig</span></code> so existing <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">config.toml</span></code> files without a
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[quality_review]</span></code> table round-trip unchanged.</p>

class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Literal" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Literal</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'auto'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'manual'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'none'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'preserve'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'auto'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">inject_css</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">patch_body_language</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/models/#EpubOutputConfig"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Optional EPUB output-language and hyphenation policy.</p>
<p>Stored under <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[epub_output]</span></code> in profile or legacy config.</p>
<p>When <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> (the default), booktx resolves effective policy from the
profile kind: translation and legacy translation projects default to
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">target</span></code> language / <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">auto</span></code> hyphenation; pass-through profiles default to
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">preserve</span></code> / <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">preserve</span></code> output policy. Storing the model opts the
project into an explicit policy.</p>
<p>See <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.epub_output_policy</span></code> for resolution and validation.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.models.EpubOutputConfig.model_config">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">model_config</span></span><span class="property"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">{'extra':</span> <span class="pre">'forbid'}</span></span></dt>
<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

<dd></dd></dl>

<dd></dd></dl>

</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.context">Persistent translation context for a booktx project.</p>
<p>The translation contract in <a class="reference internal" href="#module-booktx.models" title="booktx.models"><code class="xref py py-mod docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.models</span></code></a> preserves JSON structure,
record ids, placeholders, tags, and protected names. It does <strong>not</strong> preserve
translation <em>intent</em>: style, world terminology, and user-specific decisions.</p>
<p>This module owns the profile-local machine-readable translation context
(<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/context.json`</span></code>) and the rendered human/agent view
(<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/context.md`</span></code>) for normal profile workflows.
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.json</span></code> is authoritative; <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code> is always regenerated from it.</p>
<p>The context is built deterministically and locally. It never calls an LLM, never
makes a network request, and never approves a glossary target on its own.
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ready=false</span></code> means translation must not begin; the user (or an agent driving
the CLI on the user’s behalf) must answer the required questions first.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.StyleProfile">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">StyleProfile</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">target_locale</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'de-DE'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">formality</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Literal" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Literal</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'informal'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'neutral'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'formal'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'neutral'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">register</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">''</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">prose_style</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">''</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">dialogue_style</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">''</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">sentence_policy</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'Prefer</span> <span class="pre">natural</span> <span class="pre">German</span> <span class="pre">prose;</span> <span class="pre">preserve</span> <span class="pre">meaning</span> <span class="pre">over</span> <span class="pre">word-for-word</span> <span class="pre">syntax.'</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">punctuation_policy</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">''</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">units_policy</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'Keep</span> <span class="pre">source</span> <span class="pre">units</span> <span class="pre">unless</span> <span class="pre">the</span> <span class="pre">user</span> <span class="pre">says</span> <span class="pre">otherwise.'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#StyleProfile"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>User-approved style decisions for the translation.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.StyleProfile.model_config">

<dd><p>One question that may need a user answer before translation can begin.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">required</span></code> questions gate readiness: a context cannot be marked ready while
any required question is still open.</p>

<dd><p>Path to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/chapter-map.json</span></code> (owned by <a class="reference internal" href="#module-booktx.chapters" title="booktx.chapters"><code class="xref py py-mod docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.chapters</span></code></a>).</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.load_context">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">load_context</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#load_context"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Load the context, or return <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> if no context file exists.</p>
<p>A corrupt context raises a <a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError" title="(in Python v3.14)"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ValueError</span></code></a> so the caller can surface it
rather than silently dropping the user’s decisions.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.write_context">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_context</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#write_context"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Persist <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context</span></code> to the resolved profile’s <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.json</span></code>.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.default_context">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">default_context</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">source_sha256</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">''</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#default_context"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Build a not-ready context pre-filled from the project config.</p>
<p>Source/target languages and the source digest are taken from the project.
Style and glossary start empty/seeded; required questions are open.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.baseline_payload">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">baseline_payload</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#dict" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">dict</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#object" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">object</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#baseline_payload"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the semantic baseline payload for version resolution.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.baseline_sha256">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">baseline_sha256</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#baseline_sha256"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the baseline hash excluding chronological chapter notes.</p>
</dd></dl>

class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chapter_map</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a </dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.context_history_dir">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">context_history_dir</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><span class="pre">Path</span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#context_history_dir"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the history directory adjacent to the live context files.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.context_history_views_dir">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">context_history_views_dir</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><span class="pre">Path</span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#context_history_views_dir"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

</dd></dl>

o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">baseline_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">baseline_sha256</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span
