external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">notes_scope</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'before_target_chapter'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><span class="pre">ContextViewSnapshot</span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#ensure_context_view_snapshot"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Compose and persist an immutable task context view snapshot.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.render_context_markdown">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">render_context_markdown</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">view</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Literal" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Literal</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'full'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'effective'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'provenance'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'full'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#render_context_markdown"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Render a short, agent-readable markdown view of <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context</span></code>.</p>
<p>The markdown is always derived from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context</span></code>; it is never authoritative.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.write_context_markdown">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_context_markdown</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#write_context_markdown"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Render <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context</span></code> to the resolved profile’s <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code>.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">markdown</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ChapterContext" title="booktx.context.ChapterContext"><span class="pre">ChapterContext</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#parse_context_markdown_chapter_notes"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Parse the rendered <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">##</span> <span class="pre">Chapter</span> <span class="pre">notes</span></code> section from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code>.</p>
<p>Only the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">##</span> <span class="pre">Chapter</span> <span class="pre">notes</span></code> section is parsed; parsing stops at the next
level-2 heading. Chapter headings must match the rendered shape
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">###</span> <span class="pre">0006</span></code> or <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">###</span> <span class="pre">0006</span> <span class="pre">&lt;separator&gt;</span> <span class="pre">Title</span></code> where <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&lt;separator&gt;</span></code> is an
em dash, en dash, or ASCII hyphen. The four bullet prefixes
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">-</span> <span class="pre">Source</span> <span class="pre">summary:</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">-</span> <span class="pre">Translation</span> <span class="pre">summary:</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">-</span> <span class="pre">Decision:</span></code>, and
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">-</span> <span class="pre">Open</span> <span class="pre">issue:</span></code> are parsed exactly. Unknown non-empty content inside a
chapter note raises <a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html#ValueError" title="(in Python v3.14)"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ValueError</span></code></a>; nothing is silently mapped to
open issues.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.chapter_contexts_equivalent">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">chapter_contexts_equivalent</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">left</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ChapterContext" title="booktx.context.ChapterContext"><span class="pre">ChapterContext</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">right</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ChapterContext" title="booktx.context.ChapterContext"><span class="pre">ChapterContext</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#chapter_contexts_equivalent"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return True when two chapter notes have the same durable content.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chunk_ids</span></code> is ignored because rendered Markdown does not include chunk
ids; they are hydrated from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chapter-map.json</span></code> on import or upsert.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">ContextMarkdownDrift</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">*</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">missing_in_json</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">&lt;factory&gt;</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">conflicting</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">&lt;factory&gt;</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">parse_errors</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">&lt;factory&gt;</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#ContextMarkdownDrift"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Drift between rendered <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code> chapter notes and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.json</span></code>.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift.model_config">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">model_config</span></span><span class="property"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">{'extra':</span> <span class="pre">'forbid'}</span></span></dt>
<dd><p>Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [<cite>ConfigDict</cite>][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift.missing_in_json">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">missing_in_json</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift.conflicting">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">conflicting</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift.parse_errors">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">parse_errors</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py property">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift.unsafe_to_overwrite">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">property</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">unsafe_to_overwrite</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></dt>
<dd><p>True when overwriting <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code> would discard Markdown-only notes.</p>
</dd></dl>

</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.analyze_context_markdown_drift">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">analyze_context_markdown_drift</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift" title="booktx.context.ContextMarkdownDrift"><span class="pre">ContextMarkdownDrift</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#analyze_context_markdown_drift"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Compare existing <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code> chapter notes with <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.json</span></code>.</p>
<p>If <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code> is missing, no drift is reported. Parser failures populate
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">parse_errors</span></code> and make the overwrite unsafe.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.hydrate_chapter_contexts_from_chapter_map">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">hydrate_chapter_contexts_from_chapter_map</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chapters</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ChapterContext" title="booktx.context.ChapterContext"><span class="pre">ChapterContext</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#hydrate_chapter_contexts_from_chapter_map"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Fill <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">title</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chunk_ids</span></code> from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chapter-map.json</span></code> where absent.</p>
<p>Existing non-empty titles or chunk ids are never overwritten.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.merge_chapter_contexts">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">merge_chapter_contexts</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">imported</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ChapterContext" title="booktx.context.ChapterContext"><span class="pre">ChapterContext</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">replace_existing</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">append_existing_lists</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#merge_chapter_contexts"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Merge imported chapter notes into <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context</span></code> and return changed ids.</p>
<p>Default behavior adds notes whose chapter ids are absent, treats
equivalent notes as no-ops, and refuses differing existing notes. Pass
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">replace_existing</span></code> to replace durable fields (preserving or hydrating
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chunk_ids</span></code>), or <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">append_existing_lists</span></code> to keep existing summaries
unless empty and append non-duplicate decisions and open issues in order.
The two modes are mutually exclusive.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.upsert_chapter_context">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">upsert_chapter_context</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">note</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ChapterContext" title="booktx.context.ChapterContext"><span class="pre">ChapterContext</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">replace_decisions</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">replace_open_issues</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">replace_all</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#upsert_chapter_context"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Create or update one chapter note.</p>
<p>Title and summaries update only when provided. Decisions and open issues
append by default (avoiding exact duplicates) and replace only when the
matching replace flag is true.</p>
<p>When <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">replace_all</span></code> is true, the stored note is set exactly to the
supplied values (empty strings and empty lists are allowed).</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.ensure_context_markdown_safe_to_overwrite">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">ensure_context_markdown_safe_to_overwrite</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">allow_discard_md_only</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#ensure_context_markdown_safe_to_overwrite"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Raise <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ValueError</span></code> if writing <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code> would discard notes.</p>
<p>Runs drift analysis against the existing <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context.md</span></code>. Pass
“allow_discard_md_only=True`` for commands whose purpose is to overwrite
Markdown despite unsafe drift.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.seed_questions">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">seed_questions</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ContextQuestion" title="booktx.context.ContextQuestion"><span class="pre">ContextQuestion</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#seed_questions"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Generic initial questionnaire for any translation project.</p>
<p>The questions marked <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">required=True</span></code> gate <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ready</span></code>. Typography and units
are left optional: they affect style but a missing answer does not block the
terminology safety that the context gate exists to provide.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.seed_glossary">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">seed_glossary</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.GlossaryEntry" title="booktx.context.GlossaryEntry"><span class="pre">GlossaryEntry</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#seed_glossary"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Generic glossary seeds (empty by default).</p>
<p>Book-specific seeds can be loaded via the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--seed</span></code> option on
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">context</span> <span class="pre">init</span></code>. The Shadows-of-Apt template is available as
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--seed</span> <span class="pre">shadows-of-apt</span></code>.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.unresolved_required_questions">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">unresolved_required_questions</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.ContextQuestion" title="booktx.context.ContextQuestion"><span class="pre">ContextQuestion</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#unresolved_required_questions"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.unapproved_required_questions">

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.context.next_question_id">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.context.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">next_question_id</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.context.TranslationContext" title="booktx.context.TranslationContext"><span class="pre">TranslationContext</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">prefix</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'Q'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/context/#next_question_id"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.chunking">Sentence segmentation and chunk packing.</p>
<p>The extractor hands chunking a list of <em>protected prose spans</em> (each already
had names and inline tags replaced by placeholder tokens). chunking:</p>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>Segments each span into sentences with <code class="xref py py-mod docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">phrasplit</span></code>.</p></li>
<li><p>Assigns each resulting sentence a stable record id.</p></li>
<li><p>Packs records into <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Chunk" title="booktx.models.Chunk"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Chunk</span></code></a> objects of at most
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chunk_size</span></code> records, numbering chunks from 1.</p></li>
</ol>
<p>Record ids are <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">NNNN-NNNNNN</span></code>: the 4-digit chunk id, a dash, and a 1-based
6-digit index inside that chunk. Chunk ids are zero-padded 4-digit strings.</p>
<p>The goal stated in the spec is <strong>one source sentence to one translated
sentence</strong> — chunking never merges or splits beyond what phrasplit returns.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.chunking.ProseSpan">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.chunking.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">ProseSpan</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">placeholders</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Placeholder" title="booktx.models.Placeholder"><span class="pre">Placeholder</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">protected_terms</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">presegmented</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">source_markup</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Literal" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Literal</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'plain:v1'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'epub-inline-xhtml:v1'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'plain:v1'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/chunking/#ProseSpan"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>A protected prose span produced by a format extractor.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code> is the prose or inline-XHTML fragment with names already replaced
by placeholder tokens. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">placeholders</span></code> lists every placeholder that
appears anywhere in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code>. Segmentation filters that list per record so
each record carries only placeholders visible in its own source.
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">protected_terms</span></code> is the subset of names relevant to this span.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">presegmented</span></code> means the upstream extractor already selected this span as
one sentence/record. In that case booktx must not run phrasplit again.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_markup</span></code> records the inline markup contract of the span so it can
propagate into <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Record.source_markup</span></code> for defense-in-depth record-level
validation. The EPUB span manifest remains the authority at build time.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.chunking.ProseSpan.text">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.chunking.segment_spans">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.chunking.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">segment_spans</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">spans</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.chunking.ProseSpan" title="booktx.chunking.ProseSpan"><span class="pre">ProseSpan</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">language</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">'en'</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Record" title="booktx.models.Record"><span class="pre">Record</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/chunking/#segment_spans"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Segment every span into one <code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Record</span></code> per sentence.</p>
<p>Empty/whitespace-only sentences are dropped so a span never yields a blank
record. Each record carries only placeholders and protected terms visible
in that record’s source text.</p>
</dd></dl>

class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">records</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Record" title="booktx.models.Record"><span class="pre">Record</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">source_language</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">target_language</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">''</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chunk_size</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">50</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Chunk" title="booktx.models.Chunk"><span class="pre">Chunk</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/chunking/#pack_chunks"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Pack records into chunks of at most <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chunk_size</span></code> and assign final ids.</p>
<p>Final record ids are <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">NNNN-NNNNNN</span></code> (chunk id + 1-based intra-chunk index).</p>
</dd></dl>

class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">50</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Chunk" title="booktx.models.Chunk"><span class="pre">Chunk</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/chunking/#spans_to_chunks"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Convenience: segment spans then pack into chunks.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.placeholders">Placeholder protection and restoration for names and inline non-translatable spans.</p>
<p>booktx never sends raw protected names or inline markup to the translating
agent. Instead it replaces them with stable, collision-free tokens before
segmentation, and restores the originals verbatim after the agent returns the
translated text.</p>
<p>Two placeholder kinds are used (see <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx_coding_agent_start.md</span></code>):</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__NAME_NNN__</span></code> — a manually protected term from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">names.json</span></code>
(e.g. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Alice</span></code> -&gt; <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__NAME_001__</span></code>).</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__TAG_NNN__</span></code>  — an inline non-translatable span extracted from the document
(inline code, URLs/link destinations) -&gt; <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__TAG_001__</span></code>.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>Tokens are unique within a document and round-trip safe: applying
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.placeholders.protect_names" title="booktx.placeholders.protect_names"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">protect_names()</span></code></a> then <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.placeholders.restore" title="booktx.placeholders.restore"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">restore()</span></code></a> (or <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.placeholders.protect_tags" title="booktx.placeholders.protect_tags"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">protect_tags()</span></code></a> then
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.placeholders.restore" title="booktx.placeholders.restore"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">restore()</span></code></a>) returns the original text exactly.</p>
<dl class="py data">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.placeholders.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS</span></span><span class="property"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">{'blockquote',</span> <span class="pre">'em',</span> <span class="pre">'heading',</span> <span class="pre">'list_item',</span> <span class="pre">'paragraph',</span> <span class="pre">'strong',</span> <span class="pre">'table_cell',</span> <span class="pre">'td',</span> <span class="pre">'th'}</span></span></dt>
<dd><p>Translatable container types whose <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">inline</span></code> children we extract from.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py data">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.placeholders.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES</span></span><span class="property"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">{'code_block',</span> <span class="pre">'fence',</span> <span class="pre">'html_block'}</span></span></dt>
<dd><p>Block types whose content must never be translated.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.placeholders.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">ProtectResult</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">placeholders</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Placeholder" title="booktx.models.Placeholder"><span class="pre">Placeholder</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/placeholders/#ProtectResult"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Outcome of a protect pass.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code> has originals replaced by tokens. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">placeholders</span></code> is ordered by
first appearance and each <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Placeholder.original</span></code> is the verbatim string to
restore.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult.text">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult.placeholders">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">placeholders</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Placeholder" title="booktx.models.Placeholder"><span class="pre">Placeholder</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult.__init__">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">__init__</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">placeholders</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Placeholder" title="booktx.models.Placeholder"><span class="pre">Placeholder</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.protect_names">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.placeholders.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">protect_names</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">terms</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">start_index</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">1</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult" title="booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult"><span class="pre">ProtectResult</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/placeholders/#protect_names"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Replace each protected term in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code> with a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__NAME_NNN__</span></code> token.</p>
<p>Matching is case-sensitive and whole-term (no word-boundary tricks) so
multi-word names like <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Mr.</span> <span class="pre">Smith</span></code> win over <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Mr.</span></code>. Tokens are numbered
by <strong>first appearance</strong> in the text (longest terms are matched first to
avoid sub-string collisions, but the token id follows text order).</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.protect_tags">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.placeholders.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">protect_tags</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">originals</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">start_index</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">1</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult" title="booktx.placeholders.ProtectResult"><span class="pre">ProtectResult</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/placeholders/#protect_tags"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Replace each inline non-translatable span with a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__TAG_NNN__</span></code> token.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">originals</span></code> is the list of verbatim spans to hide (inline code, URLs, …)
as discovered by the format extractor. They are replaced longest-first and
only if the span actually occurs in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code>.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.restore">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.placeholders.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">restore</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">placeholders</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.Placeholder" title="booktx.models.Placeholder"><span class="pre">Placeholder</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/placeholders/#restore"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Replace each token in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code> with its recorded original.</p>
<p>Used by the build step on the <em>agent’s translated</em> text. Tokens are restored
verbatim; missing tokens are left in place (the validator flags those).</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.placeholders.span_token_ids">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.placeholders.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">span_token_ids</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">template</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/placeholders/#span_token_ids"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__SPANTX_NNNN__</span></code> tokens found in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">template</span></code>, in order.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.markdown_io">Markdown extraction and rebuild.</p>
<p>Extraction walks a markdown document with <code class="xref py py-mod docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">markdown_it</span></code>, identifies the
translatable prose spans (the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">inline</span></code> tokens inside paragraphs, headings,
list items, blockquotes, and table cells), hides inline code / link URLs / raw
HTML behind <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__TAG_NNN__</span></code> tokens, hides protected names behind
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__NAME_NNN__</span></code> tokens, and returns:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>a <strong>template</strong> — the original markdown with each translatable inline replaced
by a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__SPANTX_NNNN__</span></code> placeholder; and</p></li>
<li><p>a list of <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.chunking.ProseSpan" title="booktx.chunking.ProseSpan"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ProseSpan</span></code></a> in placeholder order.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>Non-translatable blocks (YAML front matter, fenced code, indented code, HTML
blocks) are left untouched in the template.</p>
<p>Rebuild is the inverse: substitute each <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__SPANTX_NNNN__</span></code> with the supplied
translated span text (already name/tag-restored by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">build.py</span></code>).</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.markdown_io.MarkdownExtraction">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.markdown_io.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">MarkdownExtraction</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">template</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">spans</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.chunking.ProseSpan" title="booktx.chunking.ProseSpan"><span class="pre">ProseSpan</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">front_matter</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/markdown_io/#MarkdownExtraction"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Result of <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.markdown_io.extract_markdown" title="booktx.markdown_io.extract_markdown"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">extract_markdown()</span></code></a>.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.markdown_io.MarkdownExtraction.template">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">template</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">spans</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.chunking.ProseSpan" title="booktx.chunking.ProseSpan"><span class="pre">ProseSpan</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.markdown_io.MarkdownExtraction.__init__">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">__init__</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">template</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">spans</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.chunking.ProseSpan" title="booktx.chunking.ProseSpan"><span class="pre">ProseSpan</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">front_matter</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

</dd></dl>

<dl class="py data">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.markdown_io.FRONT_MATTER_RE">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.markdown_io.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">FRONT_MATTER_RE</span></span><span class="property"><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="pre">re.compile('\\A---\\r?\\n(.*?\\r?\\n)---\\r?\\n?',</span> <span class="pre">re.DOTALL)</span></span></dt>
<dd><p>YAML front matter at the very start of a document.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.markdown_io.extract_markdown">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.markdown_io.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">extract_markdown</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">protected_terms</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span
