class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.markdown_io.MarkdownExtraction" title="booktx.markdown_io.MarkdownExtraction"><span class="pre">MarkdownExtraction</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/markdown_io/#extract_markdown"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract translatable spans from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code>.</p>
<p>Returns the rebuild template and the ordered prose spans.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.markdown_io.build_markdown">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.markdown_io.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">build_markdown</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">template</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">span_replacements</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/markdown_io/#build_markdown"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Rebuild markdown by substituting each <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">__SPANTX_NNNN__</span></code> in order.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">span_replacements[i]</span></code> replaces the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">(i+1)</span></code>-th span placeholder. Extra
replacements are ignored; missing replacements leave the token in place.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.markdown_io.split_front_matter">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.markdown_io.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">split_front_matter</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#tuple" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">tuple</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/markdown_io/#split_front_matter"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Split leading YAML front matter from the body.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">(front_matter_with_fences,</span> <span class="pre">body)</span></code>. If there is no front matter,
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">front_matter</span></code> is empty and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">body</span></code> is the original text.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.epub_io.build_epub">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.epub_io.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">build_epub</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">source_path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">output_path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">extraction</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.epub_io.EpubExtraction" title="booktx.epub_io.EpubExtraction"><span class="pre">EpubExtraction</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">span_replacements</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/epub_io/#build_epub"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Rebuild an EPUB via text2epub using one replacement per extracted span.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">span_replacements</span></code> provides one target string per entry in
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">extraction.spans</span></code> (sentence-level). Spans are grouped back into one
<code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text2epub.Replacement</span></code> per block-level <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">span_ref</span></code>: for each
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">span_ref</span></code> the replacements whose span index falls in
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[span_ref.span_index,</span> <span class="pre">next_span_index)</span></code> are joined with a space. When
every span of a block is unchanged, the original raw block is reused so
pass-through builds stay byte-identical even when the joined sentence XHTML
differs from the stored block fragment.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.epub_io.extract_epub">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.epub_io.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">extract_epub</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">protected_terms</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.epub_io.EpubExtraction" title="booktx.epub_io.EpubExtraction"><span class="pre">EpubExtraction</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/epub_io/#extract_epub"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Extract translatable EPUB spans through epub2text structured blocks.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.epub_io.read_epub">

<dd></dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.validate">Validation of agent-translated chunks against the booktx contract.</p>
<p>The validator loads every source chunk in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/chunks/</span></code> and the matching
translated chunk in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/translated/</span></code> (if present), and enforces the
hard rules from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx_coding_agent_start.md</span></code>:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>The translated JSON must be valid JSON.</p></li>
<li><p>The record count must be unchanged.</p></li>
<li><p>No record id may change.</p></li>
<li><p>No target may be empty.</p></li>
<li><p>No placeholder may be removed or changed.</p></li>
<li><p>No protected name may be translated or removed.</p></li>
<li><p>The translated file must contain no commentary outside the JSON structure.</p></li>
</ul>
<p>The goal is <strong>one source sentence to one translated sentence</strong>. The validator
never merges or splits records.</p>
<p>A <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.ValidationReport" title="booktx.validate.ValidationReport"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ValidationReport</span></code></a> collects per-chunk findings and a summary, and is
written to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/reports/</span></code>. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate_project</span></code> returns the report and
exits non-zero on any mandatory failure.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.validate.Severity">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.validate.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">Severity</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/validate/#Severity"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Finding severity labels.</p>

<dd><p>One validation finding for one chunk.</p>
<p>Optional location/context fields are populated from EPUB inline-XHTML
preflight findings and left empty for plain record-level findings. They
are included in <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.Finding.as_dict" title="booktx.validate.Finding.as_dict"><code class="xref py py-meth docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">as_dict()</span></code></a> only when non-empty so the JSON report
stays backward compatible and readable.</p>

<dl class="py property">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.validate.ValidationReport.blocking_findings">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">property</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">blocking_findings</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.Finding" title="booktx.validate.Finding"><span class="pre">Finding</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></dt>
<dd><p>Findings that affect pass/fail regardless of history mode.</p>
<p>Effective-output and structural findings always count. Inactive
historical content findings are excluded: they describe candidates
that are not the current output and must not fail a normal build.</p>
</dd></dl>

<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.validate.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">strict_load_translated</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#tuple" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">tuple</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslatedChunk" title="booktx.models.TranslatedChunk"><span class="pre">TranslatedChunk</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/validate/#strict_load_translated"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Load a translated chunk, detecting commentary outside the JSON.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">(model_or_None,</span> <span class="pre">error_message_or_None)</span></code>. We parse twice: once
permissively into the model, once strictly to catch trailing commentary.</p>
</dd></dl>

</span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record_ids</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#set" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">set</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">require_complete</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.ValidationReport" title="booktx.validate.ValidationReport"><span class="pre">ValidationReport</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/validate/#validate_project"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Validate every translated chunk in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">project</span></code>.</p>
<p>Missing translations are <em>not</em> errors; only present-but-invalid translated
files produce error findings. Stale translated files whose chunk id no
longer exists produce a warning.</p>
</dd></dl>

class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.Finding" title="booktx.validate.Finding"><span class="pre">Finding</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/validate/#review_coverage_findings"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Per-pass review-coverage findings for one record.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">force_error</span></code> (used by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">build</span> <span class="pre">--require-reviewed</span></code>) treats every coverage
gap as an ERROR regardless of the pass <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">enforce</span></code> setting. Otherwise gaps
are emitted only when <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">enforce</span></code> is <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">warn</span></code> or <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">error</span></code> and the severity
follows <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">enforce</span></code>.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.validate.write_report">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.validate.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_report</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">report</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.ValidationReport" title="booktx.validate.ValidationReport"><span class="pre">ValidationReport</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/validate/#write_report"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Persist the validation report to <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/reports/</span></code> and return it.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dd><p>Join translated record targets back into one span string.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.status">Typed project status snapshot and runtime index.</p>
<p>This module owns the record/word/chunk/chapter aggregation that used to live
as the private <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_project_status_snapshot</span></code> dict inside <code class="xref py py-mod docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.cli</span></code>. It
returns a typed <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusSnapshot" title="booktx.status.StatusSnapshot"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">StatusSnapshot</span></code></a> (which serializes to the stable
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">status</span> <span class="pre">--json</span></code> v1 shape) plus a <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusRuntimeIndex" title="booktx.status.StatusRuntimeIndex"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">StatusRuntimeIndex</span></code></a> dataclass that
carries the lookup maps the command layer still needs for task creation and
record acceptance.</p>
<p>Design notes:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>The public JSON shape is preserved exactly, including the nested
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">record_range:</span> <span class="pre">{start,</span> <span class="pre">end}</span></code> field on each chapter. Do not flatten it to
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">start_record_id</span></code>/<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">end_record_id</span></code> without intentionally versioning to v2.</p></li>
<li><p>The snapshot model has <em>only</em> public fields; no <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_private</span></code> keys leak into
JSON output. Runtime lookup maps live on the separate
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusRuntimeIndex" title="booktx.status.StatusRuntimeIndex"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">StatusRuntimeIndex</span></code></a> so they never get serialized.</p></li>
<li><p>This module is intentionally free of Typer/Rich imports so it can be unit
tested directly. CLI-specific error UX (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_die</span></code>) stays in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">cli.py</span></code>; the
caller computes <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context_exists</span></code>/<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context_ready</span></code> and passes them in.</p></li>
</ul>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.status.RecordRange">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.status.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">RecordRange</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">start</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">end</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/status/#RecordRange"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

<dd><p>Aggregate translation coverage totals.</p>
<p>Used by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">status</span> <span class="pre">--json</span></code> and persisted in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationTodo.start_totals</span></code>.
Keep this model in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">models.py</span></code> so durable todo validation never depends on
a late Pydantic forward-reference rebuild.</p>

<dd><p>Lookup maps derived while building a <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusSnapshot" title="booktx.status.StatusSnapshot"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">StatusSnapshot</span></code></a>.</p>
<p>These are intentionally not serialized. They carry the live objects the
command layer needs for task creation, record acceptance, and selection.</p>

class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Recomputed EPUB visible-TOC chapter-audit summary for the current source.</p>
<p>Always recomputed at status/gate time; the persisted report is user-facing
only and is never trusted for workflow gating.</p>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.status.build_status_snapshot">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.status.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">build_status_snapshot</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">proj</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context_exists</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">context_ready</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusBundle" title="booktx.status.StatusBundle"><span class="pre">StatusBundle</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/status/#build_status_snapshot"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Build a typed status snapshot and runtime index for <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">proj</span></code>.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context_exists</span></code>/<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">context_ready</span></code> are computed by the caller (the CLI
owns the invalid-context error UX). Everything else — source/chunk
loading, effective-translation merge, chapter mapping, coverage math — is
owned here.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.status.build_profiles_overview">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.status.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">build_profiles_overview</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.ProfilesOverview" title="booktx.status.ProfilesOverview"><span class="pre">ProfilesOverview</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/status/#build_profiles_overview"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.status.selected_chapter">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.status.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">selected_chapter</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">bundle</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusBundle" title="booktx.status.StatusBundle"><span class="pre">StatusBundle</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chapter_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.ChapterProgress" title="booktx.status.ChapterProgress"><span class="pre">ChapterProgress</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/status/#selected_chapter"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the focused chapter for the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">status</span></code>/<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">next</span></code> commands.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chapter_id=None</span></code> selects the first chapter with remaining records
(<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">snapshot.next</span></code>), which is <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> when everything is translated.
A specific <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chapter_id</span></code> returns that chapter whether or not it still has
remaining records; the caller decides how to react to a complete chapter.
Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> only when the id is unknown.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.tasks">Translation-task creation, durable task paths, and submission hints.</p>
<p>Centralizes the durable-file layout and id derivation for translation tasks
so the command layer stops reconstructing paths and submit-hints inline.</p>
<p>Profile-layout projects (primary):</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>translations/&lt;profile&gt;/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.json
translations/&lt;profile&gt;/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.source.block.txt
translations/&lt;profile&gt;/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.json
translations/&lt;profile&gt;/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.block.txt</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>Legacy single-layout projects (compatibility only):</p>
<blockquote>
<div><p>.booktx/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.json
.booktx/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.source.block.txt
.booktx/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.json
.booktx/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.block.txt</p>
</div></blockquote>
<p>All task-path access goes through <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation_task_dir(project)</span></code> which
enforces the profile-required guard for source-only projects. The
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TaskPaths</span></code> value object bundles the four per-task files and renders the
project-relative display strings and submit commands the CLI prints.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.tasks.TaskPaths">

class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">agent_brief</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">source_block</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">ingest_json</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#TaskPaths"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.tasks.make_task_id">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.tasks.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">make_task_id</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chapter_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">first_record_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record_ids</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#make_task_id"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Derive a deterministic, path-safe task id.</p>
<p>Uses a stable <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">blake2s</span></code> digest (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">digest_size=4</span></code>) of the joined record
ids instead of Python’s process-randomized <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">hash()</span></code>, plus a
seconds-precision UTC timestamp so same-day collisions are extremely
unlikely.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.tasks.task_paths">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.tasks.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">task_paths</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.tasks.TaskPaths" title="booktx.tasks.TaskPaths"><span class="pre">TaskPaths</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#task_paths"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.tasks.TaskPaths" title="booktx.tasks.TaskPaths"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TaskPaths</span></code></a> bundle for <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">task_id</span></code>.</p>
<p>Routes through <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation_task_dir(project)</span></code> so a source-only
project (no selected profile) hits the profile-required guard instead of
silently assuming legacy <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/tasks</span></code> paths.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.tasks.project_relative">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.tasks.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">project_relative</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">root</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#project_relative"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return a stable project-relative display path when possible.</p>
</dd></dl>

class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">max_words</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#limit_records_by_words"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the longest prefix of <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">record_ids</span></code> within <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">max_words</span></code>.</p>
<p>The first record is always included when <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">record_ids</span></code> is non-empty so a
single long record still makes progress.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.tasks.write_ingest_template">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.tasks.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_ingest_template</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationTask" title="booktx.models.TranslationTask"><span class="pre">TranslationTask</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#write_ingest_template"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Create the durable JSON submission file for a task without overwriting work.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.tasks.write_block_ingest_template">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.tasks.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_block_ingest_template</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationTask" title="booktx.models.TranslationTask"><span class="pre">TranslationTask</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">mode</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><span class="pre">RuntimeMode</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><span class="pre">Path</span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#write_block_ingest_template"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Create the durable block submission file for a task without overwriting work.</p>
<p>The file starts with metadata comment headers (ignored by the block parser)
followed by one <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">&gt;&gt;&gt;</span> <span class="pre">RECORD_ID</span></code> header per record. The agent fills in the
target text under each header.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.tasks.write_task_source_block">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.tasks.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_task_source_block</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationTask" title="booktx.models.TranslationTask"><span class="pre">TranslationTask</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">mode</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><span class="pre">RuntimeMode</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><span class="pre">Path</span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/tasks/#write_task_source_block"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Create the durable source-view file for a task without overwriting work.</p>
<p>Holds the original source text for each record in the task so a coding
agent can translate against a stable file instead of a large stdout dump.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.submissions">Submission payload parsing for the translate-accept commands.</p>
<p>Owns the three submission wire formats (JSON, TSV, block) and the input-source
selection that the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translate</span> <span class="pre">insert</span></code> command used to inline. Parsers return
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord" title="booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord</span></code></a> lists directly so the acceptance
service never sees raw dicts.</p>
<p>Validation errors are raised as <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.BooktxError" title="booktx.config.BooktxError"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.config.BooktxError</span></code></a>; the CLI
renders them via the shared <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_handle_booktx_error</span></code> path, so messages stay
identical to the previous inline <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_die</span></code> calls.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.submissions.ParsedSubmission">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.submissions.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">ParsedSubmission</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">records</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord" title="booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord"><span class="pre">SubmittedRecord</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">translation_version</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">profile</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/submissions/#ParsedSubmission"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>A parsed submission payload: optional task id + validated records.</p>
<dl class="py method">

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.submissions.read_submission_file">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.submissions.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">read_submission_file</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">ingest_hint</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/submissions/#read_submission_file"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Read a submission file, raising BooktxError (never a traceback) on failure.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ingest_hint</span></code> is a project-relative path to the canonical profile-local
ingest file (e.g. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translations/&lt;profile&gt;/ingest/&lt;task&gt;.block.txt</span></code>). When
the requested file is missing and differs from the hint, the error message
points the agent at the generated ingest location instead of <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">/tmp</span></code> or
other temporary paths.</p>
</dd></dl>

href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">input_format</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">stdin</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">json_file</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">input_file</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">ingest_hint</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.submissions.ParsedSubmission" title="booktx.submissions.ParsedSubmission"><span class="pre">ParsedSubmission</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/submissions/#resolve_submission"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Select the input source and parse it into a <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.submissions.ParsedSubmission" title="booktx.submissions.ParsedSubmission"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ParsedSubmission</span></code></a>.</p>
<p>Mirrors the previous inline dispatch in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translate_insert</span></code>: a single
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--record-id</span></code>/<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--target</span></code> pair wins, then <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--json-file</span></code>, then
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--file</span></code> (with <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--format</span></code>), then <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--stdin</span></code>. Raises BooktxError for
any ambiguous or missing combination.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.acceptance">Translation-record acceptance service.</p>
<p>Centralizes the validate-and-persist flow that was duplicated between the
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translate</span> <span class="pre">insert</span></code> (batch) and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translate</span> <span class="pre">set-record</span></code> (single-record)
commands. Both commands used to re-implement the same steps: look up the
source view, validate each record against the current context, bail on the
first ERROR finding, then mutate the translation store with a shared
timestamp and refresh the status snapshot.</p>
<p>This module owns the pure workflow:</p>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>Resolve each submitted record id against the source index (raising
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.BooktxError" title="booktx.config.BooktxError"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.config.BooktxError</span></code></a> for duplicate / unknown / out-of-task
ids, which the CLI renders exactly like any other user-facing error).</p></li>
<li><p>Load the translation context <strong>once</strong> and validate every record against it.</p></li>
<li><p>If any validation produced an ERROR finding, raise
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError" title="booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">SubmissionValidationError</span></code></a> carrying those findings — the store is
not touched.</p></li>
<li><p>Otherwise mutate the store atomically with one shared timestamp and return
an <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult" title="booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">AcceptResult</span></code></a> describing the post-accept progress for the first
affected chapter.</p></li>
</ol>
<p>The CLI wrappers parse options, call <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.accept_translation_records" title="booktx.acceptance.accept_translation_records"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">accept_translation_records()</span></code></a> (or
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.accept_one_record" title="booktx.acceptance.accept_one_record"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">accept_one_record()</span></code></a>), then render the result. Console output is
intentionally not produced here so the service is unit-testable without
Typer/Rich.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.acceptance.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">SubmittedRecord</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">target</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/acceptance/#SubmittedRecord"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>One validated submission item (record id + target text).</p>

href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">0</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">records_total</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">0</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">records_remaining</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">0</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/acceptance/#AcceptResult"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Post-accept progress for the first affected chapter.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chapter_id</span></code> is empty when the accepted record(s) could not be mapped to
a chapter; the CLI treats that as “no chapter line to print”.</p>

<dl class="py exception">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">exception</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.acceptance.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">SubmissionValidationError</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">findings</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.Finding" title="booktx.validate.Finding"><span class="pre">Finding</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/acceptance/#SubmissionValidationError"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Raised when one or more submitted records failed ERROR-level validation.</p>
<p>Carries the ERROR findings so the CLI can render them with the existing
submission-failure renderer. The translation store is never written when
this is raised.</p>
<dl class="py method">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError.__init__">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">__init__</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">findings</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.Finding" title="booktx.validate.Finding"><span class="pre">Finding</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/acceptance/#SubmissionValidationError.__init__"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

</dd></dl>

<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.acceptance.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">validate_submitted_records</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">proj</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">bundle</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusBundle" title="booktx.status.StatusBundle"><span class="pre">StatusBundle</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">submitted</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord" title="booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord"><span class="pre">SubmittedRecord</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationTask" title="booktx.models.TranslationTask"><span class="pre">TranslationTask</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">enforce_task_membership</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.Finding" title="booktx.validate.Finding"><span class="pre">Finding</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/acceptance/#validate_submitted_records"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Validate submitted records, raising BooktxError on id problems.</p>
<p>Context is loaded exactly once. Returns all findings (any severity); the
caller decides whether ERROR findings should block the store write.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.acceptance.accept_translation_records">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.acceptance.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">accept_translation_records</span></span><span
