class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">submitted</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord" title="booktx.acceptance.SubmittedRecord"><span class="pre">SubmittedRecord</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">bundle</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusBundle" title="booktx.status.StatusBundle"><span class="pre">StatusBundle</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationTask" title="booktx.models.TranslationTask"><span class="pre">TranslationTask</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">submission_translation_version</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">submission_profile</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">enforce_task_version</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult" title="booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult"><span class="pre">AcceptResult</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/acceptance/#accept_translation_records"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Validate and atomically persist a batch of accepted records.</p>
<p>Raises <code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">BooktxError</span></code> for duplicate / unknown / out-of-task ids and
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError" title="booktx.acceptance.SubmissionValidationError"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">SubmissionValidationError</span></code></a> when any record fails ERROR-level
validation. On success the store is written once and an
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult" title="booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">AcceptResult</span></code></a> is returned.</p>
<p>Note: callers pass a <em>fresh</em> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">bundle</span></code> built before acceptance. The
returned progress fields reflect a <em>refreshed</em> snapshot taken after the
store write, matching the historical CLI output exactly.</p>
</dd></dl>

</span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">submission_profile</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">enforce_task_version</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult" title="booktx.acceptance.AcceptResult"><span class="pre">AcceptResult</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/acceptance/#accept_one_record"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Validate and persist a single accepted record.</p>
<p>Equivalent to <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.acceptance.accept_translation_records" title="booktx.acceptance.accept_translation_records"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">accept_translation_records()</span></code></a> with one item, but also
enforces that a non-empty target was supplied (the single-record command
rejects empty targets before reaching the store).</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.rendering">Rich/text/JSON output renderers.</p>
<p>Moved out of <code class="xref py py-mod docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.cli</span></code> so command functions contain only option
parsing + service call + renderer call. Each renderer owns the exact console
output and can be unit-tested without Typer.</p>
<p>The module creates its own <code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">rich.console.Console</span></code> so it never depends
on the CLI module (which would create a circular import).</p>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.rendering.format_chunk_span">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.rendering.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">format_chunk_span</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chunk_ids</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/rendering/#format_chunk_span"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return a compact chunk-id range string for human display.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.rendering.print_status_human">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.rendering.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">print_status_human</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">bundle</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.StatusBundle" title="booktx.status.StatusBundle"><span class="pre">StatusBundle</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chapter</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.status.ChapterProgress" title="booktx.status.ChapterProgress"><span class="pre">ChapterProgress</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/rendering/#print_status_human"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Render the human-readable <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span> <span class="pre">status</span></code> summary to the console.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.rendering.print_translate_task">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.rendering.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">print_translate_task</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">task</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">mode</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">None</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">as_json</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">output_format</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">show_sources</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">show_template</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">False</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/rendering/#print_translate_task"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Render a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translate</span> <span class="pre">next</span></code> / <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translate</span> <span class="pre">task</span></code> result to the console.</p>
<p>Supports four output modes: <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--json</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--format</span> <span class="pre">tsv</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">--format</span> <span class="pre">block</span></code>
(the durable agent workflow), and the default human-readable list.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.rendering.render_submission_failures">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.rendering.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">render_submission_failures</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">findings</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.validate.Finding" title="booktx.validate.Finding"><span class="pre">Finding</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/rendering/#render_submission_failures"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Render submission validation ERROR findings to the console.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.io_utils">Atomic write and timestamp helpers.</p>
<p>Centralizes the atomic-write pattern (write to a sibling temp file, then
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">replace</span></code>) that was previously duplicated as the private
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_write_json_atomic</span></code> in <a class="reference internal" href="#module-booktx.config" title="booktx.config"><code class="xref py py-mod docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.config</span></code></a> and reimplemented inline as
direct <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Path.write_text</span></code> calls in several modules.</p>
<p>All booktx persistence (translation store, context, chapter map, manifest,
reports, chunks, task source files, and ingest templates) should route
through <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.io_utils.write_text_atomic" title="booktx.io_utils.write_text_atomic"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">write_text_atomic()</span></code></a> or <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.io_utils.write_json_model_atomic" title="booktx.io_utils.write_json_model_atomic"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">write_json_model_atomic()</span></code></a> so an
interrupted write never leaves a half-empty file in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.booktx/</span></code>.</p>
<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.io_utils.utc_timestamp">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.io_utils.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">utc_timestamp</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/io_utils/#utc_timestamp"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the current UTC time as a second-precision ISO-8601 <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Z</span></code> string.</p>
<p>Equivalent to the inline expression that was duplicated in the translate
acceptance path. Microseconds are dropped so timestamps are stable and
human-comparable.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.io_utils.write_text_atomic">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.io_utils.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_text_atomic</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/io_utils/#write_text_atomic"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Write UTF-8 <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text</span></code> atomically into <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">path</span></code>.</p>
<p>The file is written to a hidden sibling temp file in the same directory and
then <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">replace</span></code>d into place, so readers either see the previous file or
the complete new file, never a partial write. Parent directories are
created on demand. The temp file is cleaned up if the write fails.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.io_utils.write_json_model_atomic">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.io_utils.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_json_model_atomic</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><span class="pre">Path</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">model</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><span class="pre">BaseModel</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">indent</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">2</span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">trailing_newline</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/io_utils/#write_json_model_atomic"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Serialize a Pydantic <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">model</span></code> to JSON and write it atomically into <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">path</span></code>.</p>
<p>Mirrors the previous <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">model_dump_json(indent=2)</span> <span class="pre">+</span> <span class="pre">&quot;\n&quot;</span></code> convention used
by the store, chapter map, and chunk writers. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">by_alias</span></code> and other dump
options must be applied by the caller via <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">model.model_dump_json</span></code> when
needed; this helper is for the common default case.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.io_utils.write_json_text_atomic">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.io_utils.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">write_json_text_atomic</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">path</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/pathlib.html#pathlib.Path" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Path</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/io_utils/#write_json_text_atomic"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Write already-serialized JSON text atomically into <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">path</span></code>.</p>
<p>Used when the caller has already produced JSON via <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">json.dumps</span></code> or
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">model_dump_json(by_alias=True)</span></code> and just needs the atomic write plus a
trailing newline. The trailing newline matches the historical convention.</p>
</dd></dl>

<p id="module-booktx.record_refs">Helpers for canonical record and version references.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.record_refs.RecordRef">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.record_refs.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">RecordRef</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">chunk_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">part_id</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/record_refs/#RecordRef"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Parsed record reference with stable canonical rendering.</p>

<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py property">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.record_refs.RecordRef.canonical_id">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">property</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">canonical_id</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></dt>

<p id="module-booktx.translation_store">Helpers for working with nested translation stores.</p>
<p>This module also hosts the <strong>legacy compatibility surface</strong> for the old
flat (v1) <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationStore</span></code>: <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.translation_store.legacy_store_to_v2" title="booktx.translation_store.legacy_store_to_v2"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">legacy_store_to_v2()</span></code></a> and
<a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.translation_store.migrate_legacy_store" title="booktx.translation_store.migrate_legacy_store"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">migrate_legacy_store()</span></code></a> convert legacy stores into the nested v2 shape.
They are kept here, clearly named, so legacy import/export stays quarantined
from the active v2 store logic.</p>
<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.MigrationResult">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">MigrationResult</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">store</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationStoreV2" title="booktx.models.TranslationStoreV2"><span class="pre">TranslationStoreV2</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">migrated_records</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">missing_source_ids</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#MigrationResult"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Result of converting a legacy flat store into the v2 nested shape.</p>
<dl class="py attribute">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.MigrationResult.store">
<span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">store</span></span><span class="property"><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationStoreV2" title="booktx.models.TranslationStoreV2"><span class="pre">TranslationStoreV2</span></a></span></dt>
<dd></dd></dl>

<dl class="py class">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateError">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">EffectiveCandidateError</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">rule</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">message</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#EffectiveCandidateError"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>A blocking problem resolving the effective candidate for a record.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">rule</span></code> mirrors the validation rule names (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">active_review_missing</span></code>,
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">active_review_not_accepted</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">active_review_base_drift</span></code>) so editor
index errors stay aligned with build/validate findings.</p>

<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateSelection">
<span class="property"><span class="k"><span class="pre">class</span></span><span class="w"> </span></span><span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">EffectiveCandidateSelection</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">candidate</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationCandidate</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationReviewCandidate</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">selected_kind</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Literal" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">Literal</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'translation'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">,</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s"><span class="pre">'review'</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">selected_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">version_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">review_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">review_chain</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#EffectiveCandidateSelection"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Effective output candidate plus provenance metadata.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">selected_kind</span></code>/<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">selected_ref</span></code> identify which candidate produces the
output. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">version_ref</span></code> is the base translation version the output derives
from; <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review_ref</span></code> is the selected review ref when the output is a
review candidate. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review_chain</span></code> is the ordered review chain (earliest
first) for review selections and empty for direct translations.</p>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.active_candidate">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">active_candidate</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationCandidate</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#active_candidate"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the active candidate for a record, if any.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.active_review_candidate">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">active_review_candidate</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationReviewCandidate</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#active_review_candidate"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the usable active review candidate, or None if unusable.</p>
<p>A review is usable only when present, accepted, and chain-valid. Stale,
rejected, cyclic, or invalid-pass-order active reviews are not returned.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.effective_candidate_selection">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">effective_candidate_selection</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">strict_active_review</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o"><span class="pre">=</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="default_value"><span class="pre">True</span></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateSelection" title="booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateSelection"><span class="pre">EffectiveCandidateSelection</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateError" title="booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateError"><span class="pre">EffectiveCandidateError</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#effective_candidate_selection"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Resolve the effective candidate plus selection metadata for a record.</p>
<p>With <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">strict_active_review=True</span></code> (the default), a set-but-unusable
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">active_review</span></code> returns an <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateError" title="booktx.translation_store.EffectiveCandidateError"><code class="xref py py-class docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">EffectiveCandidateError</span></code></a> instead of
silently falling back to the active translation. This is the safe mode for
editor indexes, which must never mask an invalid active review. With
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">strict_active_review=False</span></code> an unusable active review falls back to the
accepted active translation, mirroring <a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.translation_store.effective_target_candidate" title="booktx.translation_store.effective_target_candidate"><code class="xref py py-func docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">effective_target_candidate()</span></code></a>.</p>
<p>Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> only when there is no accepted effective candidate.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.effective_target_candidate">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">effective_target_candidate</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationCandidate</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationReviewCandidate</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#effective_target_candidate"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Resolve the effective output target for a record.</p>
<p>Prefers the active review candidate when present and chain-valid;
otherwise falls back to the active translation version.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.ensure_store_record">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">ensure_store_record</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">store</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationStoreV2" title="booktx.models.TranslationStoreV2"><span class="pre">TranslationStoreV2</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.record_refs.RecordRef" title="booktx.record_refs.RecordRef"><span class="pre">RecordRef</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="keyword-only-separator o"><abbr title="Keyword-only parameters separator (PEP 3102)"><span class="pre">*</span></abbr></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">source</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#ensure_store_record"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the v2 store record, creating it when needed.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.find_candidate">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">find_candidate</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">version_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationCandidate</span></a><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#find_candidate"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the matching candidate, if present.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.find_review_candidate">

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.review_candidate_is_stale">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">review_candidate_is_stale</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">review</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate" title="booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate"><span class="pre">TranslationReviewCandidate</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#review_candidate_is_stale"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return True when the direct base of a review is missing or drifted.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.review_chain_is_stale">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">review_chain_is_stale</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">review_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">bool</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#review_chain_is_stale"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return True when any base in the review derivation chain is missing or drifted.</p>
<p>Walks from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review_ref</span></code> back to the translation base, rejecting missing
bases, target-hash mismatches, and cycles.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.review_chain_refs">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">review_chain_refs</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">record</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2" title="booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2"><span class="pre">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">review_ref</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#list" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">list</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">[</span></span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a><span class="p"><span class="pre">]</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p"><span class="pre">|</span></span><span class="w"> </span><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">None</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#review_chain_refs"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the ordered review chain ending at <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review_ref</span></code> (earliest first).</p>
<p>The chain excludes the translation base. For <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">R2.1</span></code> based on <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">R1.1</span></code>
based on a translation version, returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">[&quot;R1.1&quot;,</span> <span class="pre">&quot;R2.1&quot;]</span></code>. Returns
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> when the chain is missing, stale (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">base_target_sha256</span></code> drift),
cyclic, or violates the lexicographic <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">(pass,</span> <span class="pre">run)</span></code> order (so same-pass
reruns such as <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">R1.2</span></code> from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">R1.1</span></code> are valid).</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.translation_store.sha256_text">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.translation_store.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">sha256_text</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">text</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/translation_store/#sha256_text"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Return the canonical SHA256 hex digest for a target/base text.</p>
</dd></dl>

<dl class="py function">
<dt class="sig sig-object py" id="booktx.versioning.set_track_label">
<span class="sig-prename descclassname"><span class="pre">booktx.versioning.</span></span><span class="sig-name descname"><span class="pre">set_track_label</span></span><span class="sig-paren">(</span><em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">project</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.config.Project" title="booktx.config.Project"><span class="pre">Project</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">major_version</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">int</span></a></span></em>, <em class="sig-param"><span class="n"><span class="pre">label</span></span><span class="p"><span class="pre">:</span></span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n"><a class="reference external" href="https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str" title="(in Python v3.14)"><span class="pre">str</span></a></span></em><span class="sig-paren">)</span> <span class="sig-return"><span class="sig-return-icon">&#x2192;</span> <span class="sig-return-typehint"><a class="reference internal" href="#booktx.models.TranslationVersionLedger" title="booktx.models.TranslationVersionLedger"><span class="pre">TranslationVersionLedger</span></a></span></span><a class="reference internal" href="../_modules/booktx/versioning/#set_track_label"><span class="viewcode-link"><span class="pre">[source]</span></span></a></dt>
<dd><p>Set the label for one major track.</p>
</dd></dl>

</section>
</div>
<script data-sphinxpress-script="search" defer>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  function initForm(form) {
    var input = form.querySelector(".tool-search-input");
    var results = form.querySelector(".tool-search-results");
    var navList = form.parentElement
      ? form.parentElement.querySelector(".tool-nav-list")
      : null;
    if (!input || !results) {
      return;
    }
    var emptyText = form.getAttribute("data-search-empty") || "No matches.";
    var indexUrl = form.getAttribute("data-search-index");
    if (!indexUrl) {
      hideForm();
      return;
    }

    var indexEntries = null;
    var indexError = false;
    var pendingQuery = null;

    function hideForm() {
      form.style.display = "none";
    }

    function escapeHtml(value) {
      return value
        .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
        .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
        .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
        .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
        .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
    }

    function showEmpty() {
      results.innerHTML =
        '<p class="tool-search-empty">' + escapeHtml(emptyText) + "</p>";
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function clearResults() {
      results.innerHTML = "";
      results.hidden = true;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = false;
      }
    }

    function renderResults(entries, tokens) {
      if (!entries.length) {
        showEmpty();
        return;
      }
      var html = entries
        .map(function (entry) {
          var snippetHtml = renderSnippet(entry, tokens);
          var href = entry.url + "#sphinxpress-search-hit";
          return (
            '<li class="tool-search-result">' +
            '<a href="' +
            escapeHtml(href) +
            '">' +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-title">' +
            escapeHtml(entry.title) +
            "</p>" +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-snippet">' +
            snippetHtml +
            "</p>" +
            "</a>" +
            "</li>"
          );
        })
        .join("");
      results.innerHTML = html;
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function renderSnippet(entry, tokens) {
      var source = entry.snippet || "";
      if (!source) {
        return "";
      }
      var lower = source.toLowerCase();
      var firstToken = tokens[0] || "";
      var idx = lower.indexOf(firstToken);
      if (idx < 0) {
        return escapeHtml(source);
      }
      var before = source.slice(0, idx);
      var match = source.slice(idx, idx + firstToken.length);
      var after = source.slice(idx + firstToken.length);
      return (
        escapeHtml(before) +
        "<mark>" +
        escapeHtml(match) +
        "</mark>" +
        escapeHtml(after)
      );
    }

    function runQuery(query) {
      if (!indexEntries) {
        return;
      }
      var tokens = query
        .toLowerCase()
        .split(/\s+/)
        .filter(function (token) {
          return token.length > 0;
        });
      if (!tokens.length) {
        clearResults();
        return;
      }
      var hits = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < indexEntries.length; i += 1) {
        var entry = indexEntries[i];
        if (!entry.sections || !entry.sections.length) {
          continue;
        }
        var matched = true;
        var score = 0;
        for (var t = 0; t < tokens.length; t += 1) {
          var token = tokens[t];
          var found = false;
          var tokenScore = 0;
          for (var s = 0; s < entry.sections.length; s += 1) {
            var section = entry.sections[s];
            var lowerText = section.lower || "";
            if (!lowerText) {
              continue;
            }
            var from = 0;
            while (from <= lowerText.length) {
              var foundAt = lowerText.indexOf(token, from);
              if (foundAt < 0) {
                break;
              }
              tokenScore += 1;
              from = foundAt + token.length;
            }
            if (tokenScore > 0) {
              found = true;
            }
          }
          if (!found) {
            matched = false;
            break;
          }
          score += tokenScore;
        }
        if (matched) {
          hits.push({ entry: entry, score: score });
        }
      }
      hits.sort(function (a, b) {
        return b.score - a.score;
      });
      var top = hits.slice(0, 20).map(function (hit) {
        return hit.entry;
      });
      renderResults(top, tokens);
    }

    function handleInput() {
      var query = input.value || "";
      if (!query.trim()) {
        clearResults();
        pendingQuery = null;
        return;
      }
      if (indexError) {
        hideForm();
        return;
      }
      if (indexEntries) {
        runQuery(query);
      } else {
        pendingQuery = query;
      }
    }

    input.addEventListener("input", handleInput);

    fetch(indexUrl, { credentials: "same-origin" })
      .then(function (response) {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error("HTTP " + response.status);
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(function (payload) {
        if (
          !payload ||
          !Array.isArray(payload.entries) ||
          payload.entries.length === 0
        ) {
          hideForm();
          return;
        }
        indexEntries = payload.entries;
        if (pendingQuery) {
          runQuery(pendingQuery);
        }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        indexError = true;
        if (input.value && input.value.trim()) {
          hideForm();
        } else {
          hideForm();
        }
      });
  }

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll("form.tool-search");
    for (var i = 0; i < forms.length; i += 1) {
      initForm(forms[i]);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

</script>
{% endraw %}
